$comment: Curated release notes shown to users via VersionUpdater toast and Settings → What's New. Newest entry first. The first entry is mirrored into version.json at build time so the in-app prompt knows what changed when nudging users to refresh.

releases.title: Free Mode AI 出图重做:多模态 + 画质/比例/多参考图,外加一批稳定性修复
highlights: Free Mode 出图重做 — 输入图片+文字现在会忠实多模态生成一张新图,不再被系统套成铅笔'角色故事板'(本次最大改动)
出图新增画质选择:经济 / 标准 / 高清,按档位计费 3→6 credit(最高 2×),面板实时显示本次扣费
出图新增比例选择:横版 / 方形 / 竖版,以及'自动'—— 自动跟随你单张参考图的比例
支持多张参考图(最多 4 张)合成出图:上传 / Pick Actor / 素材库均可多选,逐个移除
短剧创作:AI 编剧偶发的'空白卡死 / 无限转圈'已根治(移除旧 memfire 路径 + 30s 超时兜底)
封面体验:可从视频选帧设封面;新视频自动用时长 10% 处的帧(跳过纯黑首帧);修复选帧器黑屏 + 滑块卡死
导航与移动端:整页刷新后返回不再误回 Discover;修复 iOS 输入聚焦放大 / 触摸目标过小 / 搜索栏关闭图标
沉浸式播放:修复 Safari 横版尺寸抖动、封面'清晰→模糊→清晰'闪烁、letterbox 漏出相邻视频
Seedance 2.0 Fast 不支持 1080p — 自动按模型钳到支持档并按生效档位计费

releases.title: 短剧付费体系 + 多分段叙事 + 角色设定图 + 全新错误体验
highlights: Drama paywall: series can now have first N free episodes + per-episode unlock with U-Coins + whole-series buyout via Stripe. Author and admin both see real-time earnings + can confirm settlements
New U-Coins wallet at /wallet — 6 top-up packs ($0.99 ~ $49.99, $0.99 首充翻倍 200 → 400 U-Coins), live balance + transaction history, Stripe-only payment with success-redirect polling
Subscribers (Starter / Creator / Studio) automatically gain '短剧会员' status — free access to any series where ops marked '会员免费'. Admin can adjust which tiers count via system_settings
Multi-segment story mode — pick 1-5 segments in Quick Mode, render each independently then merge with ffmpeg in-browser. Lets you build longer stories without one giant render

CHARACTER IDENTITY BOARD — a second polished image is now generated alongside the storyboard, showing your protagonist's face / costume / proportions in the chosen art style with inspiration from your Actor photo
Free Mode: video genre tag picker (Vlog / MV / Short Drama / Trailer / Art Film / Product) — your works now show up in Discover's genre filters
Free Mode: + 4 new aspect ratios (21:9 ultrawide, 9:21 vertical ultra, 4:3 retro, 3:4 portrait) on top of the original 16:9 / 9:16 / 1:1
Free Mode: asset certification button — upload real-person reference photos to BytePlus Private Asset Library to bypass the safety filter
Free Mode: per-segment save indicator + manual retry — each segment card shows 已入库 / 保存中 / 重试保存 so you always know whether the work actually landed in Library
Library: drafts now sync across devices via Supabase — start on iPhone, continue on Mac. Multiple drafts (one per mode) shown side by side
Library: Works tab now has refresh button + Bulk delete mode. Private works can be deleted directly
Library: Free Mode works AND drafts both appear here (previously hidden)
Render confirm modal: price now updates live when you change resolution AND model (Standard model is 1.5× Fast by default)
Render station: failed segments show '重试' button right on the card — no more re-run from scratch when one Seedance call fails
All Seedance / upload / video-merge errors now show as friendly inline banners with one-click retry instead of blocking browser alert popups
Player consistency: every Stream video in Library / Series / Spark / Hero now uses the same UnifiedVideoPlayer (HLS lookahead prefetch, no more black box on non-Safari)
Sequel / Series detail page now shows ★首发 / ♥推荐 / 会员免费 pills + episode lock badges + price right on each episode card
Direct video download (no more blank tab) — Cloudflare Stream pre-processes the mp4 before triggering a real file download
Spark: TikTok-style 10-deep lookahead prefetch + ordering by recency × popularity + auto-exclude already-watched
iOS Safari fixes: stuck-after-5-swipes pause logic, unmuted-autoplay-after-swipe, video-frame-then-black resilience

Admin Dashboard: 5 new drama tabs — 剧集收益 (8 metric cards + daily trend chart + composition donut + Top 10 leaderboard), 剧集管理 (per-series price config + lifecycle), 分成结算 (monthly settlement engine + state transitions), 付费流水 (cross-table ledger + per-user LTV drawer), 投流 ROI (per-channel ad spend tracking + ROI multiplier)
Creator self-service: /creator/earnings page lists your settlements per month, confirm with one click, CSV export
ffmpeg.wasm resilience: unpkg fallback when R2 wasm is missing, plus ESM core fix for module-worker dynamic import
Style picker rewritten — 21 GPT-image-2-optimized styles organized in 5 categories, replacing the old random grab-bag
Story drafts auto-save also pings Supabase every 3s now — your in-progress work survives device switches, browser clears, and tab crashes

releases.title: Team chat, dev log, decision policy, and rename groundwork
highlights: Admin Dashboard now has Team Chat — real-time three-way conversation between you, the dev team, and Claude as an AI participant. Tag @claude to query data, propose code, draft documentation
Daily Dev Log in the admin backend — every non-trivial activity day gets a log entry visible to all team members. Searchable history of what shipped and why
Help Center articles are now admin-managed with full markdown support — add or edit articles from the dashboard without redeploying
Profile reliability: switching accounts now properly clears the previous user's data instead of showing stale works and follower counts
Account switching no longer triggers JWT lock conflicts on rapid focus events
Foundation for v1.2 naming consolidation — backend dual-writes both legacy and new token/grant column names, so future frontend changes can roll out gradually without breaking existing integrations
Source attribution rename — the internal source_character_id field has been correctly renamed to source_actor_id throughout the codebase to match its actual semantics
Sequel flow no longer carries the legacy 'Continuation' label internally — UI and code now use Sequel / Branch / Recast consistently per product spec

releases.title: Engagement counts, privacy controls, and admin upgrades
highlights: Like and Save counts now actually update — your engagements register on every work and show real numbers on the card and detail view
New Save button in the video detail player — save works to revisit later, alongside Like
Privacy toggle on your own works — flip any of your published works between Public (visible everywhere) and Private (hidden from Discover) right from the card hover or detail view
Recast button no longer skips the script step — pick a new character and style, then review and edit the AI-generated story before rendering
Recast button is now gated on the original creator's 'Allow Recast' setting — respect creators who opted out
Wallet page shows a complete activity history — every video, image, or script generation with its token cost, filterable by status and paginated
Help Center now has real content — admins curate articles in the dashboard, with full markdown support (headings, lists, links, code blocks, tables)
Stripe pricing adjusted: video generation costs 4 / 6 / 12 tokens per second at 480p / 720p / 1080p (was 2 / 3 / 7)
Admin: click any order in Payments & Orders to see the full Stripe payment detail — card brand, last 4 digits, refund history, receipt URL, raw payment intent state
Admin: refund / void / restore actions also available inline in the new order detail drawer
Admin: Help Articles tab for curating the user Help Center — add / edit / publish / hide articles per category

releases.title: Lite top-up, profile upgrades, and reliability fixes
highlights: New Lite plan: $3.99 one-time top-up for 100 tokens — no subscription, no auto-renewal, buy whenever you need a quick boost
Saved tab on your profile — bookmark works you want to revisit, separate from the Liked tab
Click your Followers or Following count to see exactly who they are — unfollow or follow back right from the list
Following tab on Discover now actually shows works from the creators you follow (was previously empty)
Recast flow now pauses at the script step so you can rewrite the story before rendering — no more being railroaded to auto-generation
Fixed video playback crash when opening details from My Works, Search Results, or your profile
Email receipts for every payment, refund, and support credit — sent via our verified send.uvera.ai domain
Self-healing AI model resilience — if our upstream provider rotates models, the app silently falls back instead of erroring
Live follower / following counts that actually update when you follow or unfollow someone
Admin: refund any Stripe order with one click, with usage-based abuse signals to prevent 'used most of it then refunded' loss
Admin: rebuilt Payments view with search, status filters, Stripe Dashboard quick-links, and soft-delete (void) instead of hard delete
Admin: grant or adjust user tokens from any user row with full audit trail

releases.title: Admin tools, compliance, and reliability
highlights: Brand-new content report button on Discover — flag inappropriate or copyright-violating content with one click
Cookie notice for transparency — we use essential cookies only, never marketing trackers
Series management overhaul — drag to reorder episodes, edit published series, unpublish from Discover anytime
Live admin user management — search, ban, role assignment all in one place
Detailed admin generation logs — every AI call captured with full params and cost, plus CSV export
Many playback fixes — user-uploaded videos now play correctly across Discover, immerse mode, and series detail pages
Daily +6 tokens claim now reliably persists across sessions
Faster Create page — landing screen no longer waits on background data

releases.title: Series + uploads + content management
highlights: New 'Create a Series' mode — multi-episode stories with a recurring cast, save drafts, publish to Discover
New 'Upload Video' mode — submit your own video (up to 500 MB) for review, published on approval
All uploads reviewed within 48 hours — track status anytime from Library → My Uploads
Library now has Series and My Uploads tabs so you can manage all your work in one place
Series detail page with full episode list — viewers can browse every episode, not just the first
Reorder, edit, and unpublish your published series at any time without losing your work

releases.title: GA-ready: payments, polish, and personalization
highlights: Stripe subscriptions are live — pick a plan from /subscription and pay with card
Daily +6 tokens for everyone — claim from Wallet once per day
Create flow rebuilt to match the rest of the app's visual language
AI script now matches your input language (write Chinese / Japanese / English; get scripts in the same)
Style picker replaced 9-page pagination with category filters (Animation / Traditional / Avant-garde / Modern)
Video render now shows live elapsed time + progress bar instead of a frozen-looking spinner
Stricter per-row authorization on user data (RLS) — your characters and orders are now actually private
Legal docs available — Terms, Privacy, Content License linked from Subscription and Settings
Creative Canvas beta-access card on the Create page — pro tools coming, request early access
